title: polystichum squarrosum var. chinense
intro: Polystichum squarrosum var. chinense, also known as the Chinese rock fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum squarrosum var. chinense include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and dried extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
